class.name: GaussianSplatDebugHUD
class.brief_description: In-viewport debug overlay that displays Gaussian Splatting performance statistics.
class.description: GaussianSplatDebugHUD is a Control node that draws runtime performance statistics directly in the game or editor viewport. It renders splat count, FPS, GPU memory usage, streaming status, sort/render timings, and other key metrics collected from the linked [GaussianSplatRenderer]. The HUD is created and managed by [GaussianSplatNode3D] when its debug HUD property is enabled. Use [member corner] to choose which viewport corner displays the overlay, [member update_interval] to control refresh frequency, and [member font_size] or [member background_color] to adjust visual presentation. The HUD automatically ignores mouse input so it does not interfere with scene interaction.

method.name: refresh_stats
method.description: Forces an immediate refresh of the displayed statistics, bypassing the normal [member update_interval] cadence.

members.member: Which corner of the viewport the HUD panel appears in. See [enum Corner] for valid values.
How often the HUD refreshes its statistics, in seconds. Lower values provide more responsive readouts at a small CPU cost. Clamped to the range [code]0.016[/code] to [code]1.0[/code].
Size of the HUD text in pixels. Clamped to the range [code]8[/code] to [code]32[/code].
Background color of the HUD panel. Adjust the alpha component to control transparency.

constants.constant: Position the HUD in the top-left corner of the viewport.
Position the HUD in the top-right corner of the viewport.
Position the HUD in the bottom-left corner of the viewport.
Position the HUD in the bottom-right corner of the viewport.
